title: Limited Chinese ability
summary: You do not speak much Chinese, so destination visibility and communication support matter more for your trip.

title: Multi-city complexity
summary: You are moving across multiple cities, so transport transitions and booking access matter more than usual.

title: Food and dining constraints
summary: You have food-related constraints, so meal planning and communication cards are more important for you.

title: Low technology confidence
summary: You may benefit from fewer tools and clearer sequencing, rather than a large number of apps and options.

title: Solo travel responsibility
summary: Because you are traveling alone, backup planning and quick access to your key information matter more.

title: First-time arrival pressure
summary: Because this is your first trip to China, arrival-day structure and fallback planning will matter more than optimization.

title: Payment uncertainty
summary: You are especially concerned about payments, so it is worth preparing both a main method and a fallback before departure.

title: Connectivity uncertainty
summary: You are concerned about staying connected, so offline access and a simple internet setup plan should be treated as top priorities.
